params.name: Black Hole Photo
params.description: This photo, taken by the Event Horizon Telescope, shows a super-massive blackhole that is 55 million light-years away from Earth. It weighs equivalent to 6.5 billion suns. This photo conclusively proves the theory of general relativity.
